mapper.select: SELECT p.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, p.business_number AS businessNumber, p.contact_name AS contactName, p.contact_phone AS contactPhone, p.contact_email AS contactEmail, p.has_exp AS hasExp, p.status AS status, p.commission_rate AS commissionRate, p.contractfile_url AS contractFileUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt, ps.status_code AS statusCode, ps.memo AS statusMemo, NVL(sales.monthlySales, 0) AS monthlySales, NVL(rv.avgRating, 0) AS rating, NVL(rv.reviewCount, 0) AS reviewCount FROM ( SELECT p.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY p.business_number ORDER BY p.created_at DESC ) AS rn FROM partner p ) p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT partner_id, status_code, memo FROM ( SELECT ps.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.partner_id ORDER BY ps.partner_status_id DESC) AS rn FROM partner_status ps ) WHERE rn = 1 ) ps ON ps.partner_id = p.partner_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pl.partner_id, ROUND(AVG(pr.rating), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(pr.review_id) AS reviewCount FROM place pl JOIN place_review pr ON pr.place_id = pl.place_id GROUP BY pl.partner_id ) rv ON rv.partner_id = p.partner_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p2.partner_id, NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount), 0) AS monthlySales FROM partner p2 JOIN place pl ON pl.partner_id = p2.partner_id JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE o.status != 'CANCELED' AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') GROUP BY p2.partner_id ) sales ON sales.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE p.rn = 1 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName FROM partner p JOIN ( SELECT partner_id, status_code FROM ( SELECT ps.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.partner_id ORDER BY ps.partner_status_id DESC) AS rn FROM partner_status ps ) WHERE rn = 1 ) ps ON ps.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND ps.status_code = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.partner_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO partner_status ( partner_status_id, partner_id, status_code, memo, reg_date, register_id ) VALUES ( seq_partner_status.NEXTVAL, #{partnerId}, #{status}, #{memo}, SYSDATE, #{registerId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE member1 SET role = 'ROLE_PARTNER' WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND role != 'ROLE_PARTNER'

UPDATE partner
status = #{activeStatus},
commission_rate = #{commissionRate},
WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO partner ( partner_name, business_number, contact_name, contact_phone, commission_rate, created_at ) VALUES ( #{partnerName}, #{businessNumber}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{commissionRate}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO partner_status ( partner_status_id, partner_id, status_code, reg_date, register_id ) VALUES ( seq_partner_status.NEXTVAL, #{partnerId}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE, #{registerId} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.partner_id AS partnerId, p.member_id AS memberId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, p.logo_image_url AS logoImageUrl, p.business_number AS businessNumber, p.contact_name AS contactName, p.contact_phone AS contactPhone, p.contact_email AS contactEmail, p.has_exp AS hasExp, p.bank_name AS bankName, p.account_number AS accountNumber, p.status AS status, p.commission_rate AS commissionRate, p.created_at AS createdAt, ps.status_code AS statusCode, ps.memo AS statusMemo, ps.reg_date AS statusUpdatedAt, ps.register_id AS statusRegisterId, pc.contract_start_date AS contractStartDate, pc.contract_end_date AS contractEndDate, pc.contractfile_url AS contractFileUrl, pc.contract_memo AS contractMemo FROM partner p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT partner_id, status_code, memo, reg_date, register_id FROM ( SELECT ps.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.partner_id ORDER BY ps.partner_status_id DESC) AS rn FROM partner_status ps ) WHERE rn = 1 ) ps ON ps.partner_id = p.partner_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT contract_id, partner_id, contract_start_date, contract_end_date, contractfile_url, contract_memo FROM ( SELECT c.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.partner_id ORDER BY c.contract_id DESC) AS rn FROM partner_contract c ) WHERE rn = 1 ) pc ON pc.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ps.partner_id) FROM partner_status ps WHERE ps.status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND TRUNC(ps.reg_date, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')

SELECT DISTINCT p.partner_id FROM partner p JOIN partner_contract pc ON pc.partner_id = p.partner_id JOIN ( SELECT partner_id, status_code FROM ( SELECT ps.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ps.partner_id ORDER BY ps.partner_status_id DESC) AS rn FROM partner_status ps ) WHERE rn = 1 ) ps ON ps.partner_id = p.partner_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND ps.status_code = 'ACTIVE' AND pc.contract_end_date < SYSDATE AND pc.contract_id = ( SELECT MAX(c2.contract_id) FROM partner_contract c2 WHERE c2.partner_id = p.partner_id )
SELECT file_id AS "docId", origin_file_name AS "docName", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "uploadDate", file_url AS "url" FROM partner_file WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId} ORDER BY file_id ASC

SELECT NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount), 0) FROM partner p JOIN place pl ON pl.partner_id = p.partner_id JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE o.status != 'CANCELED' AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT pl.place_id AS "placeId", pl.place_name AS "placeName", pl.address AS "address", pl.place_type AS "placeType", pl.status AS "status", NVL(rv.avgRating, 0) AS "rating", NVL(rv.reviewCount, 0) AS "reviewCount" FROM place pl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(review_id) AS reviewCount FROM place_review GROUP BY place_id ) rv ON rv.place_id = pl.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} ORDER BY pl.place_id DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id AS "reservationId", pl.place_name AS "placeName", m.nickname AS "memberNickname", r.check_in_date AS "checkInDate", r.check_out_date AS "checkOutDate", r.total_price AS "totalPrice", r.status AS "status" FROM reservation r JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id JOIN member1 m ON m.member_id = r.member_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} ORDER BY r.reservation_id DESC

SELECT pl.place_id AS "placeId", pl.place_name AS "placeName", pl.address AS "address", pl.category AS "placeType", pl.is_active AS "status", NVL(ROUND(AVG(pr.rating), 1), 0) AS "rating", COUNT(pr.review_id) AS "reviewCount" FROM place pl LEFT JOIN place_review pr ON pr.place_id = pl.place_id WHERE pl.partner_id = #{partnerId} GROUP BY pl.place_id, pl.place_name, pl.address, pl.category, pl.is_active ORDER BY pl.place_id ASC

SELECT rv.reservation_id AS "reservationId", pl.place_name AS "placeName", m2.nickname AS "memberNickname", rv.check_in_date AS "checkInDate", rv.check_out_date AS "checkOutDate", o.real_total_amount AS "totalPrice", rv.status AS "status" FROM reservation rv JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rv.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id JOIN partner p ON p.partner_id = pl.partner_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id JOIN member1 m ON m.member_id = rv.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND o.status != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY rv.reservation_id DESC
